1: Post-holiday. CPMs drop 30-40%. Best time to TEST aggressively. Run IVT experiments.
2: Valentine's Day (gifts, apparel). Start campaigns by Jan 25. Couple/gift angles work.
3: Spring refresh. New launches perform well. Wardrobe transitions, outdoor prep.
4: Easter + spring break. Travel, outdoor gear peak. Mother's Day prep starts late April.
5: Mother's Day (gifts). Memorial Day sales. Summer prep accelerates.
6: Summer peak. Swimwear, outdoor, fitness. CPMs moderate. Good creative testing window.
7: Prime Day competitors. Match or beat Amazon pricing. Back-to-school prep starts.
8: Back-to-school. Apparel, tech, dorm. CPMs start climbing. Build retargeting audiences.
9: Early Q4 prep. Build email lists. Start retargeting. Test holiday creatives NOW.
10: Halloween. Q4 ramp begins. CPMs increase 20-50%. Lock in winning creatives.
11: BFCM. Budget 3x normal. Launch Nov 1, not Nov 25. Aggressive scaling window.
12: Holiday rush through Dec 15, then gift cards. Post-holiday planning for January tests.
